# vendor/bin/hw/android.hardware.boot-service.qti;MAKE_COPY_RULE_ONLY
# vendor/bin/hw/android.hardware.drm-service.clearkey (Source-built)
# vendor/bin/hw/android.hardware.gatekeeper-rust-service-qti (Source-built)
# vendor/bin/hw/android.hardware.gnss-aidl-service-qti (Source-built)
# vendor/bin/hw/android.hardware.media.c2-mi-service (Source-built preferred)
# vendor/etc/init/android.hardware.media.c2-mi-service.rc (Source-built)
# vendor/bin/hw/android.hardware.power-service (provided by source)
# vendor/bin/hw/android.hardware.security.onekeymint-service-qti (Source-built)

# vendor/bin/hw/android.hardware.wifi-service (provided by source)
